title: boechera perennans subsp. centrifendleri
intro: Boechera perennans subsp. centrifendleri, also known as Rock Cross or Mountain Rockcress, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Its medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Boechera perennans subsp. centrifendleri include relieving digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
